message.content:
@startuml

class "plugin_translation\n((Translations))" as plugin_translation << (I,#6699FF) >> {
  <u>label</u> string
  description longText
  manufacturerLink string
  supportLink string
  changelog json
  customFields customFields
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  <u>updatedAt</u> updatedAt
  **pluginId** foreignKey
  **languageId** foreignKey
}

class "plugin\n(Plugin)" as plugin << (T,#FF9999) >> {
  **id** id
  <u>baseClass</u> string
  <u>name</u> string
  composerName string
  <u>autoload</u> json
  active bool
  managedByComposer bool
  path string
  author string
  copyright string
  license string
  <u>version</u> string
  upgradeVersion string
  installedAt date
  upgradedAt date
  iconRaw blob
  icon string
  label translated
  description translated
  manufacturerLink translated
  supportLink translated
  changelog translated
  customFields translated
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  <u>updatedAt</u> updatedAt
  translated json
}

class "language" as language << (T,#AAAAAA) >> {
}

class "payment_method" as payment_method << (T,#AAAAAA) >> {
}

plugin_translation --> plugin
plugin_translation --> language
plugin --> payment_method

@enduml
